name: cli-workspaces
title: CLI Workspaces
description: Focus or open CLI workspaces (tmux sessions) in your terminal emulator. If the session is already visible in a window, that window is focused. Otherwise a new window is opened and attached to the session (creating it if needed).
author: bada-bing

preferences.name: sessionsFile
preferences.title: Sessions File
preferences.description: Path to a JSON file containing the list of sessions. Items can be strings or objects with { "name": string, "description"?: string, "dir"?: string }.

commands.name: open
commands.title: Open Session
commands.description: Focus or open a CLI workspace (tmux session) in your terminal

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
